title: GOOD: fetch_optional instead of catching RowNotFound in get_session_by_address
description: get_session_by_address() uses sqlx::fetch_optional() which natively returns Option<Row>, rather than fetch_one() + catching sqlx::Error::RowNotFound. This is the idiomatic sqlx pattern and avoids a non-obvious error variant mapping. The alternative (fetch_one + error check) is error-prone because RowNotFound is not the only error type from fetch_one.
